creatives.headline: Your executive's next trip, booked in 30 seconds
creatives.body: LUXY integrates with Concur, TripActions, and every major TMC. Your travelers get professional chauffeurs. You get one-click booking and real-time trip tracking.

creatives.headline: The ground transport your travelers actually deserve
creatives.body: Not all car services are equal. Company-employed drivers. Background checks. Flight monitoring. Your executive's preferences saved from the first ride.

creatives.headline: Your booking hub for every airport, every city
creatives.body: One platform, 100+ cities, integrated with your travel management system. Book for your travelers in seconds. Concierge Dashboard built for travel arrangers.

creatives.headline: 43% of companies don't have a chauffeured contract. Yours?
creatives.body: BTN 2026 survey: service consistency jumped 0.47 points for companies with preferred partners. LUXY serves 400+ companies through Concur, TripActions, CWT, Amex GBT, CTM, and FCM.

creatives.headline: SOC 2 certified. ISO-aligned. Sunshine Act ready.
creatives.body: Company-employed chauffeurs scored 4.43/5 — highest in the BTN survey. Background checks, GPS tracking, 24/7 dispatch. The compliance your program requires.

creatives.headline: Add LUXY to your preferred vendor list
creatives.body: Corporate rates. Policy-compliant booking. Real-time trip-level spend data. 400+ companies already onboarded. No minimum commitment.

creatives.headline: The Connecticut-based car service trusted by 400+ companies
creatives.body: From Stamford to JFK. Greenwich to LaGuardia. New Haven to Newark. Professional chauffeurs who know your routes, your buildings, your airports.

creatives.headline: Your NYC ground transport, handled
creatives.body: Midtown to Teterboro in 40 minutes. Wall Street to JFK, door to door. 99.7% on-time across the tri-state. The local service that scales nationally.

creatives.headline: Your neighbors already ride with us
creatives.body: 400+ companies in the CT/NYC corridor trust LUXY. Corporate rates, Concur integration, professional chauffeurs who know the tri-state like their own driveway.

creatives.headline: Your 200-person airport arrival, handled
creatives.body: Multi-vehicle coordination across every LUXY city. Backup operators at every location. Real-time manifest tracking. Because one stranded attendee is one too many.

creatives.headline: Zero transportation failures at your next event
creatives.body: Flight monitoring for every attendee. Automatic delay adjustment. Contingency vehicles pre-positioned. Your event logistics, bulletproof.

creatives.headline: The event planner's ground transport partner
creatives.body: Conferences. Incentive trips. Galas. Board retreats. One booking hub, every city, every vehicle class. Flawless execution is the only standard.

creatives.headline: On time, every time. Your billable hour is non-negotiable.
creatives.body: A partner billing $1,200/hr cannot afford a 45-minute rideshare delay. Company-employed chauffeurs, flight monitoring, guaranteed pickup.

creatives.headline: SOC 2 data handling. Vetted for BigLaw.
creatives.body: Background-checked drivers. GPS tracking. Disbursement-ready receipts. Duty of care for associates in unfamiliar cities. Your firm's standard, met.

creatives.headline: Depositions. Court appearances. Client visits. Covered.
creatives.body: Courthouse to hotel. Office to airport. 100+ cities, integrated with Amex GBT Legal and every major TMC.

creatives.headline: Audit-ready ground transport for HCP guest travel
creatives.body: Every HCP ride is a Sunshine Act transfer of value. LUXY captures booker, passenger, addresses, duration, amount — audit-ready from day one.

creatives.headline: Fewer than half of pharma programs meet a global standard
creatives.body: BCD benchmarking of 15 global life sciences travel policies found fewer than half meet a consistent standard. 43% have no compliant ground transport. LUXY: one platform, SOC 2 certified, Sunshine Act export built in.

creatives.headline: The only ground transport built for regulated verticals
creatives.body: Sunshine Act reporting. EFPIA compliance. Event/congress tagging. HCP booking flags. Integrated with BCD, Amex GBT, CWT. Built for pharma, not adapted for it.
